NHO Byggenæringen | Arbeidsgiver- og næringsorganisasjon

https://www.bnl.no/
Avvik: 217 | Bestått: 205
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/749e0a1d46cc4e92a0bc65fadaad599f/mariahoff-103-2---moment-studios-cropped-mini.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" s
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/dc7ed47ebef14616b8f3bfa9dc76700c/2025_bygg-og-bevar_middelalderparlen_fotograf-marlen-l-hagen-4.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/klimapartnerskapet/nye-klimakrav.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/klimapartnerskapet/nye-klimakr
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-item__heading"> <a href="/artikler/2026/styrker-laget-for-et-seriost-arbeidsliv---maria-hoff/">Styrker laget for et seriøst arbeidsliv</a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'allCategory' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="20" name="allCategory" type="checkbox" value="20"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (13 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/vi-bygger-norge/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/vi-bygger-norge/embla-4---fotograf-bnl
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til "Vi Bygger Norge"'

<a class="nho-button" href="/vi-bygger-norge/"> <span>Gå til "Vi Bygger Norge"</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Lønn og tariff i byggenæringen | NHO Byggenæringen

https://www.bnl.no/arbeidsforhold/lonn-og-tariff/
Avvik: 205 | Bestått: 227
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/985e57f16ced40d4a8e67ec2d094d3ba/regelverksendringer-2024---arbeidstilsynet.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcs
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/1b454aefd02d4a55ad56b1f50eed9cc5/bigstock-norwegian-money--krone-a-busi-465207207.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/ec9a7ed62fa2442f8e08524ca0e2b8d9/regelverksendringer-2024---arbeidstilsynet.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcs
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="https://arbinn.nho.no/" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-lock-simple"></i> </div> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/endringer-i-arbeidsmiljoloven/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/985e57f16ced40d4a8e67ec2d094d3ba/regelverksendring
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/nye-allmenngjorte-satser-pa-byggfag/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/1b454aefd02d4a55ad56b1f50eed9cc5/bigstock-no
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/stotter-handlingsplanen-mot-sosial-dumping/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/ec9a7ed62fa2442f8e08524ca0e2b8d9/rege
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (186 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=35&content.link=74775&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Styret i NHO Byggenæringen

https://www.bnl.no/om-oss/styret-i-nho_byggenaringen/
Avvik: 190 | Bestått: 162
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (185 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=33&content.link=91403&content.category=&content.type.category=780&content.tags=" sty
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Helse, miljø og sikkerhet

https://www.bnl.no/arbeidsforhold/hms/
Avvik: 205 | Bestått: 191
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/47681413bde34ed688b7c4fde2200314/kari-maland---nho-byggenaringen.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/conten
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/dysleksi-webinar-artikkel-1200x630.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/dysleksi-webin
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/nortek-artikkel-1200x630.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/nortek-artikkel-1200x630
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="block-tile__heading"> <a class="block-tile__link" href="/link/c86992c163ca45f38bac56fa039b4c15.aspx"> HMS-verktøykasse </a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/hin-skal-lede-ia-programmet/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/47681413bde34ed688b7c4fde2200314/kari-maland---nho-b
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2024/webinar-dysleksi/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/dysleksi-webinar-artikkel-1200x630.jpg?mode=crop&qualit
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2024/nortekk-reduserte-sykefravaret/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/nortek-artikkel-1200x630.jpg?mode=crop&qu
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/arbeidsforhold/seriositet/veileder-mot-sosial-dumping/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/heisekr
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/arbeidsforhold/seriositet/veileder-mot-sosial-dumping/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Skillelinje' appears 2 times

id="Skillelinje"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (186 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=35&content.link=74657&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Arrangementer

https://www.bnl.no/arrangementer/
Avvik: 196 | Bestått: 172
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'fylke' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="fylke-" name="fylke" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (189 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=1083&content.link=72826&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Tariffkonferansen 2026

https://www.bnl.no/arrangementer/tariffkonferanse/
Avvik: 196 | Bestått: 160
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (191 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=1318&content.link=740609&content.category=&content.type.category=798&content.tags="
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Om oss

https://www.bnl.no/om-oss/
Avvik: 198 | Bestått: 167
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Dette får du som medlem</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/medlemskap/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/bigstock/bigstock-exhaust-pipe-of-the-truck
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'docs-internal-guid-e2997413-7fff-c2f3-9fcf-7dd3401d6b26' appears 3 times

id="docs-internal-guid-e2997413-7fff-c2f3-9fcf-7dd3401d6b26"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'docs-internal-guid-18c2c969-7fff-727b-e212-13919af6b8ba' appears 6 times

id="docs-internal-guid-18c2c969-7fff-727b-e212-13919af6b8ba"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (185 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=35&content.link=74597&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Sjekk ut den nye ROT-veilederen

https://www.bnl.no/artikler/2026/rot-veileder/
Avvik: 197 | Bestått: 166
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="429" src="/contentassets/dc7ed47ebef14616b8f3bfa9dc76700c/rot-veilederen.jpg" width="500"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (191 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=33&content.link=744723&content.category=&content.type.category=776,1204&content.tags
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Dokumenter

https://www.bnl.no/dokumenter/
Avvik: 213 | Bestått: 263
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (206 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=38&content.link=72825&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

SERIOUS

Politikk for byggenæringen | NHO Byggenæringen

https://www.bnl.no/Politikk/
Avvik: 207 | Bestått: 250
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/bilder-til-spesielle-saker/politisk-streik---chat-gpt.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/bi
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/bd5fb209b33f4b37b1906edeafbb7956/kronikk---sma-fag-store-bekymringer-cropped.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" src
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/politisk-streik/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/bilder-til-spesielle-saker/politisk-streik---chat-gpt.png?mo
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/kronikk---sma-fag---store-behov/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/bd5fb209b33f4b37b1906edeafbb7956/kronikk---sma-f
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/kronikk---boligkrisen-tar-ikke-sommerferie/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/ansattbilder/nic_3213.jpg?mode=cr
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (186 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=35&content.link=75228&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Presse

https://www.bnl.no/presse/
Avvik: 199 | Bestått: 191
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="block-promotion-popup-mobile-banner-title">Nyhetsbrev fra NHO Byggenæringen</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--medium"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-down"></i> Last ned pressebilder (fotograf: Nicolas Tourrenc)</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="/siteassets/bilder/logoer/nho_byggenaringen_rgb.png" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-crop"></i> </div> <div class="bl
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Skillelinje' appears 2 times

id="Skillelinje"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (185 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=35&content.link=78800&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Artikler

https://www.bnl.no/artikler/
Avvik: 234 | Bestått: 229
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/749e0a1d46cc4e92a0bc65fadaad599f/mariahoff-103-2---moment-studios-cropped-mini.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" s
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/dc7ed47ebef14616b8f3bfa9dc76700c/2025_bygg-og-bevar_middelalderparlen_fotograf-marlen-l-hagen-4.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/klimapartnerskapet/nye-klimakrav.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/klimapartnerskapet/nye-klimakr
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/e6c1b1c68b0f4b94ab6beca71b4cb11c/nic_9894.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/e6c1b1c68b0f4b9
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/bigstock/bigstock-architect-and-engineer-constru-454810455.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteasse
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (13 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2026/styrker-laget-for-et-seriost-arbeidsliv---maria-hoff/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/749e0a1d46cc4e92a0bc65fadaa
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2026/rot-veileder/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/dc7ed47ebef14616b8f3bfa9dc76700c/2025_bygg-og-bevar_middelalderparl
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2026/regjeringen-foreslar-nye-klimakrav-i-tek--gir-storre-frihet-og-tydeligere-klimaeffekt/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteasse
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2026/gamechanger-for-bygg-og-anlegg/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/e6c1b1c68b0f4b94ab6beca71b4cb11c/nic_9894.jpg?mod
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2026/protokoll-naf-arbeidsdager/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/bigstock/bigstock-architect-and-engineer-constru-

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (212 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=1055&content.link=72824&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Ansatte

https://www.bnl.no/om-oss/ansatte/
Avvik: 192 | Bestått: 236
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-bnl"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=1054&content.link=73900
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Administrasjonen' appears 4 times

id="Administrasjonen"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (185 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=1054&content.link=73900&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

<h1> <a href="/"> <img alt="logo" src="/contentassets/f2ad1b07205845d5959e668514c5bbee/nho_byggenringen_eiendom-og-byutvikling_rgb.png"/> </a> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4><span class="EOP SCXW252955193 BCX8" data-ccp-props='{"335559738":120,"335559739":120}' style="-webkit-user-drag: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; user-se
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/budsjettet-gir-ikke-nok-boliger/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/1af6423fee0c4cd2bdf57e700e26994c/nina-solli-pa-b
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/eldreboligalliansen-leverer-pa-obos/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/3fa96035bfee440c99a6e9e936250985/img_4100.jp
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/kronikk--fem-partier--ett-ansvar/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/52c262dc0aeb487783fbb7dc419a0e08/nho-skanska-88
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="mousetrap" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="mousetrap" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=37&content.link=643184&content.category=754,767&content.type.category=&content.tags=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Bli medlem

https://www.bnl.no/blimedlem/
Avvik: 196 | Bestått: 173

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1

SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1> <a href="/klimapartnerskapet/"> <img alt="Logo%20Klimapartnerskapet" src="/contentassets/b2e3bc6551d146dbbe87fc063a3e20fa/klimapartnerskapet.png"/> </a> </h1>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Sammen bidrar vi til å nå Norges klimamål</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Ta kontakt</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="mousetrap" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="mousetrap" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Avvik: 12 | Bestått: 58
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1> <a href="/vi-bygger-norge/"> <img alt="logo" src="/siteassets/bilder/vi-bygger-norge/vbn-logo-2-03.png"/> </a> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1></h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="#navigation"> <span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="new-header-mobile-nav-toggler campaign-header" role="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-list new-header-mobile-nav-toggler
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://youtu.be/6KtQzlKUNN0" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/vi-bygger-n
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Klikk her for å se film'

<a class="nho-button" href="https://youtu.be/6KtQzlKUNN0" target="_blank"> <span>Klikk her for å se film</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="https://youtu.be/6KtQzlKUNN0" target="_blank"> <span>Klikk her for å se film</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/siteassets/bilder/vi-bygger-norge/utdanningsveien-jan-2022.pdf" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentass
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/vi-bygger-norge/om-bygg--og-anlegg/ofte-stilte-sporsmal/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilde
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=37&content.link=98897&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Tall og fakta om markedssitasjonen i byggenæringen

https://www.bnl.no/tall-og-fakta/
Avvik: 201 | Bestått: 184
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="https://app.powerbi.com/reportEmbed?reportId=0d47f2f4-4556-48d4-be7f-897e2de87771&autoAuth=true&ctid=21be13a8-b92f-4a80-9cf3-17026d4a8118" target="_bla

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (186 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=35&content.link=76699&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Personvern og cookies

https://www.bnl.no/om-oss/personvern-og-ansvar/
Avvik: 197 | Bestått: 165
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Rettighets- og ansvarserklæring</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no">firmapost@nhobyggenaringen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (191 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6PW5BH&content.type.id=33&content.link=93107&content.category=&content.type.category=780&content.tags=" sty
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS
